name: Pan Nero
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together egg yolks and sugar until pale and thick.
2. Sift the flour mixture into the yolk mixture and stir in the melted baking chocolate.
3. Fold in the beaten egg whites until just combined.
4. Butter an 8-inch square pan and pour in the batter.
5. Bake at 375°F for 35 minutes (or until a skewer inserted comes out dry).
